title: Unusually Large HTTP Response (Data Exfiltration)
description: Detects unusually large HTTP responses that may indicate successful data exfiltration (database dumps, bulk user data extraction). OWASP A01:2021 Broken Access Control.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and (('Response Code' = '200') and (('Request URL' like '*/api/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/export*' or 'Request URL' like '*/download*' or 'Request URL' like '*/dump*' or 'Request URL' like '*/backup*' or 'Request URL' like '*/users*' or 'Request URL' like '*/data*' or 'Request URL' like '*/report*' or 'Request URL' like '*/vulnerable*')))
